question.label: Decision meaning
question.name: What did you take away from the conversation about the promotion decision?
question.description: Finds out what feedback he actually heard and believed, without assuming he received it clearly.

answer: Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.

assessment.note: He did not describe actionable feedback from the promotion conversation and instead located usefulness in mentoring, signaling strong clarity loss and mild growth drift.

new_queue.label: Mentoring useful
new_queue.name: Mentoring feels useful — what is it giving you right now that the core role isn't?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
